subject: deploy.sh does not work on Mac os x because untar directory is created before helm fetch
commit_message:
deploy.sh does not work on Mac os x because untar directory is created before helm fetch

Issue-ID: OOM-2407
Signed-off-by: yoonsoonjahng <yoonsoon.jahng@yoppworks.com>
Change-Id: I20e6169bd8c7794db4c6972bfd7bca4f0bf6a910

Change-Id: I01f8c26539e6ceb828a73458d74a8185e9a5081f
Signed-off-by: yoonsoonjahng <yoonsoon.jahng@yoppworks.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 4: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

deploy.sh does not fetch helm chart on Mac OS x command line interface.
Helm fetch --untar command is failed when there is the target directory already.
It may work for Linux but not for Mac OS x.

Moving `mkdir -p` below the helm fetch command, deploy.sh can avoid the issue

Patch Set 1: Verified+1
